title: Stop hand-tuning kernels: How Neuron Agentic Development accelerates AWS Trainium optimizations
content: Today, we’re announcing the Neuron Agentic Development capabilities: a collection of AI agents and skills that make this possible for developers building on AWS Trainium and AWS Inferentia. In this post, we explain how the Neuron Agentic Development capabilities accelerate the kernel development workflow. Artificial Intelligence Stop hand-tuning kernels: How Neuron Agentic Development accelerates AWS Trainium optimizations by Josh Longenecker and John Liu on 10 JUN 2026 in Advanced (300) , Amazon EC2 , Technical How-to Permalink Share As frontier AI models grow in scale and complexity, developers face a common challenge across every hardware platform: how do you extract the maximum performance and efficiency from the silicon their models run on. Whether delivering real-time experiences for world models, supporting deeper reasoning in agentic workflows, or reducing inference costs at scale, the gap between what hardware can theoretically deliver and what most teams achieve remains significant. Custom kernel development has historically been the path to closing that gap, but it demands deep architectural expertise, manual profiling workflows, and iterative optimization cycles that few teams can afford. This doesn’t need to be the case. What if every machine learning (ML) engineer could operate as a performance engineer, writing hardware-aware kernels, diagnosing bottlenecks, and shipping optimized models, without years of chip-level experience? What if developers already proficient on one architecture could ramp up on another in days instead of months? Today, we’re announcing
eventKey: stop-hand-tuning-kernels-how-neuron-agentic
normalizedTitle: stop hand-tuning kernels how neuron agentic development accelerates aws trainium optimizations
scoreReasoning: AI基础设施与开发者工具优化的重要技术进展，直接关乎工程效率跃迁。
summary: As frontier AI models grow in scale and complexity, developers face a common challenge across every hardware platform: how do you extract…

content: 美团旗下 GN06 团队宣布 AI 原生浏览器 Tabbit 1.0 正式上线。Tabbit 是浏览器形式的 AI 入口，内置多款头部大模型，用户输入需求后可自动执行跨软件、跨网页等各类复杂任务。Tabbit 标准版永久免费，Windows、macOS 同步上架，移动端已开启测试。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 MCP 接入 美团 旗下 GN06 团队宣布 AI 原生浏览器 Tabbit 1.0 正式上线。Tabbit 是浏览器形式的 AI 入口，内置多款头部大模型，用户输入需求后可自动执行跨软件、跨网页等各类复杂任务。Tabbit 标准版永久免费， Windows 、 macOS 同步上架，移动端已开启测试。 美团 Tabbit AI 浏览器正式版上线：核心功能永久免费！整合主流国内大模型 -- 快科技 -- 科技改变未来 快科技 美团发布 AI 浏览器 Tabbit 1.0 Agent 任务成功率超 90% 新浪科技 2026-06-09 美团发布 AI 浏览器 Tabbit 1.0 2026-06-09 美团接入微信 AI 生态，未来提供外卖等 AI 生活服务体验 2026-04-27 美团 AI 助手「小团」升级并迁移至 App 首页，支持自然语言交互与实时核验 2026-03-02 光年之外首款 AI 原生浏览器 Tabbit 进入公测 2025-11-10 美团首款 AI IDE 产品 CatPaw 开启公测 2025-09-12 美团首款 AI Agent 产品「小美」公测 2025-09-10 美团 C 端 AI 智能体服务将于一周内发布 2025-06-27 发布 AI 数字员工，美团瞄准下沉服务零售市场 2025-06-10 美团发布首款 AI 编程工具 集成自研模型让 0 基础用户可轻松开发软件 2025-05-20 美团推出 AI 编程工具 NoCode 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签

summary: Meituan's GN06 team launched Tabbit 1.0, an AI-native browser that serves as an AI gateway. It integrates multiple major large language models and can automatically execute complex cross-software and cross-webpage tasks based on user input. The standard version is permanently free and available on Windows and macOS, with mobile testing underway.

title: 苹果抨击「为 AI 而 AI」，称有用 AI 需以用户为中心

summary: At Apple's 2026 WWDC, Craig Federighi criticized the trend of pursuing AI for its own sake, arguing that useful AI must center on users and their needs. He stated that new Apple Intelligence technology makes Apple products more personalized and practical.

title: DeepSeek 开招「土木老哥」：自建 GW 级数据中心
content: DeepSeek 官网上线「IDC 设计规划工程师」岗位，该岗位属于算力基建、通信基建核心技术岗，负责数据中心从前期选址、方案、布局到施工图、落地配套的全流程规划设计，是机房建设前期核心技术负责人，涉及从 MW 到 GW 级基础设施的规划与建设。 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 MCP 接入 DeepSeek 官网上线「IDC 设计规划工程师」岗位，该岗位属于算力基建、通信基建核心技术岗，负责数据中心从前期选址、方案、布局到施工图、落地配套的全流程规划设计，是机房建设前期核心技术负责人，涉及从 MW 到 GW 级基础设施的规划与建设。 DeepSeek 开招土木老哥：自建 GW 级数据中心 华尔街见闻 / 量子位 / 格隆汇

summary: DeepSeek is recruiting an IDC design planning engineer for data center infrastructure. The role covers full-cycle planning from site selection to construction drawings, overseeing megawatt-to-gigawatt scale facilities.
